column1: Pablo Picasso was born in 1881 and died in 1973. He's an extremely well-known_________. (PAINT)
Although he was born in Spain, he spent most of his_______________life in Paris. (AMAZE)
Most of Picasso's pictures are quite______________to look at, as the contain strange shapes and very weird faces. (USUAL)
His pictures are very bright. ________________ often say they are dramatic works of art. (VIEW)
Picasso had close________________with several other famous people from that time, including Henti Matisse and Gertrude Stein. (FRIEND)
His talent was widely recognised during his lifetime, and when people think of the greatest artists of all time, they_____________think of him. (GENERAL)
When Nick returned from his holiday, he met his friend Jill for a drink. She asked him if he had had a__________time. (RELAX)
Nick said he'd really enjoyed swimming and visiting all the_____________, but that it hadn't all been perfect. (ATTRACT)
Because of this, Jill asked him what had made him____________during the trip. (HAPPY)
Nick replied that he hadn't really liked the hot weather. "You can't__________enjoy yourself when you're sweating all the time", he said. (EASY)
Jill reminded him that now he was back in London, where it was grey and__________ . (CLOUD)
"I know" said Nick, "but_______________I still have some sunborn from Thailand to keep me warm!" (LUCKY)
